recommendations.description: Rule checks SecurityPolicyName twice - once for exists and once for in array. This is valid but could be optimized to a single check if the 'in' operator handles null values.

validation_summary.notes: All discoveries correctly use items_for for arrays. All field paths match emit structure. Test executed successfully with no errors. All 1 rule is properly configured. The rule correctly checks Protocols contains SFTP and SecurityPolicyName exists and is in the allowed list. Note: YAML comment mentions 'Check evaluation may need adjustment for Protocols list field handling' but test completed successfully, suggesting the contains operator works correctly for the Protocols array.
